title: Audit ferrolearn-decomp vs sklearn (decomposition + cross_decomposition + manifold + random_projection): close gaps, add API proof tests
description:
Step 6 of 12 in sklearn parity audit (#240).

Scope: sklearn.decomposition (PCA, KernelPCA, IncrementalPCA, SparsePCA, MiniBatchSparsePCA, TruncatedSVD, FastICA, NMF, MiniBatchNMF, LatentDirichletAllocation, FactorAnalysis, DictionaryLearning, MiniBatchDictionaryLearning, SparseCoder, dict_learning, dict_learning_online), sklearn.cross_decomposition (PLSRegression, PLSCanonical, PLSSVD, CCA), sklearn.manifold (Isomap, LocallyLinearEmbedding, SpectralEmbedding, MDS, TSNE, trustworthiness), sklearn.random_projection (GaussianRandomProjection, SparseRandomProjection, johnson_lindenstrauss_min_dim).

Related existing issues: #90 (MiniBatchDictionaryLearning), #91 (SparseCoder), #222 (trustworthiness)
